profile.name: Gaurav Patil
profile.title: ML/DL Student Researcher
profile.affiliation: AI & Data Science @ SIES Graduate School of Technology
profile.bio: Machine learning researcher and engineer working on deep learning for vision, multimodal, and 3D data.

researchLog.title: Retrieval consistency for image encoder robustness
researchLog.note: Studying how retrieval rankings shift when vision encoder inputs are perturbed.

researchLog.title: Detection-guided grocery recognition
researchLog.note: Refining the multimodal pipeline that combines detection, visual embeddings, and OCR text.

researchLog.title: MeshTron: High-Fidelity Mesh Reconstruction from Point Clouds
researchLog.note: Notes on neural 3D reconstruction, topology, and point-to-mesh generation.

researchLog.title: Robustness and consistency in vision-language retrieval
researchLog.note: Tracking papers that connect perturbation behavior with retrieval reliability.

publications.title: Probing Image Encoder Robustness via Retrieval Consistency Under Input Perturbations
publications.authors: Gaurav Patil, Ahmad Mustapha, Dr. Ali Chehab

publications.title: Detection-Guided Multimodal Grocery Recognition
publications.authors: Gaurav Patil, Dr.Neetu Sabu, Ayaan Dwivedi, Harsh Chaudhary, Madhavan Nadar

products.title: Real Time Asset Organizer
products.description: A productivity tool for managing and organizing digital assets in real-time.

experience.title: Deep Learning Research Intern
experience.company: Chehab Lab @ American University of Beirut
experience.description: Got to work with 15 image encoders, benchmarked their stability to input perturbation under 14 different perturbation types. Authored a research paper about the results obtained from the benchmark run (it got accepted at ICANN'26). Also worked on other research projects involving analyzing representation collapse of image encoders on medical imaging, curating brain MRI volumes scans into clean extracted slices and pushing them on huggingface repo in tabular format (I curated 3 of em). Overall, learnt a lot about deep learning research in academic setting and most importantly, I had fun

experience.title: Backend Developer Intern
experience.description: Built and automated backend workflows for contract generation and digital signing using Django and Python. Automated end-to-end processes using cron jobs on AWS EC2 and ensured secure storage of signed documents in S3.
